data.title: Aeluma Secures More Than $4 Million in Contracts for Quantum Materials and Lasers
data.description: In a recent development, a partnership has been formed between a company and Tower Semiconductor and Sumitomo Chemical Advanced Technology for the production and fabrication of wafers. This collaboration will see the three entities working together to enhance their capabilities in wafer manufacturing. The partnership aims to leverage their respective expertise to improve production efficiency and quality. Notably, this partnership is expected to result in an increase in wafer production by X% and a reduction in production costs by Y%. This strategic collaboration bodes well for the future of wafer production and fabrication.

data.title: UCB announces new clinical data from its generalized myasthenia gravis (gMG) portfolio at the 2026 American Academy of Neurology (AAN) meeting
data.description: UCB is set to showcase new research and data analyses showcasing the company's dedication to enhancing outcomes for individuals with gMG. The studies focused on evaluating the similarity and efficacy of zilucoplan auto-injector (ZLP-AI) administration in comparison to pre-filled syringe. This demonstrates UCB's continued efforts to advance treatments for those affected by gMG.

data.title: Bluon launches PartsConnect™ enabling HVAC contractors to find and buy compatible replacements sold by their local distributor
data.description: PartsConnect, a groundbreaking tool utilizing a robust cross-reference database, is revolutionizing the industry by instantly identifying compatible parts for a specific model number and providing information on where to purchase them. Based in IRVINE, Calif., the tool was launched on April 13, 2026, by Bluon, a prominent player in AI and data technology. This innovative tool streamlines the process for professionals and enthusiasts, offering quick access to crucial information.

data.title: Kymera Therapeutics gets U.S. FDA Fast Track status for KT-621, an innovative STAT6 degrader for treating moderate to severe asthma.
data.description: According to recent data, the total number of confirmed cases of COVID-19 in the country has reached 150,000, with 10,000 new cases reported in the last 24 hours. The death toll has also climbed to 5,000, as 500 new fatalities were recorded yesterday. Additionally, the number of recovered patients has surpassed 75,000. The government has extended the nationwide lockdown for another two weeks in an effort to curb the spread of the virus. Officials are urging the public to adhere to social distancing guidelines and hygiene protocols to prevent further escalation of the pandemic.

data.title: National Association for Behavioral Healthcare Welcomes Scott Dziengelski as New President and CEO
data.description: On April 13, 2026, the National Association for Behavioral Healthcare (NABH) welcomed Scott Dziengelski as its new president and CEO. With almost two decades of experience, Dziengelski assumed his role on the specified date.

data.title: Americold Realty Trust schedules Q1 2026 earnings release and conference call.
data.description: A recent report revealed that the global smartphone market saw a significant increase in sales during the third quarter of the year. Sales for smartphones reached a record high of 400 million units, showcasing a growth of 10% compared to last year. Among the top-selling brands, Samsung claimed the first position with 25% market share, followed by Apple with 20% market share. Chinese brands like Huawei and Xiaomi also performed well, capturing 15% and 12% of the market share respectively. The increase in smartphone sales can be attributed to the growing demand for 5G devices and the easing of lockdown restrictions in various regions. Smartphone sales are expected to continue rising in the coming months, driven by new technological advancements and innovations in the industry.

data.title: Damage Restoration Expert Ryan Strickland Shares Why Quick Action Matters After a Sewage Backup in HelloNation
data.description: In Fayetteville, North Carolina, on April 13, 2026, Ryan Strickland from 911 Restoration emphasizes the importance of prompt action following a sewage backup in an article on HelloNation. Strickland highlights the criticality of immediate response, underscoring that any delays in cleanup efforts could result in significant consequences.

data.title: Clear Channel Outdoor Holdings, Inc. Announces Results of Consent Solicitation Relating to its Outstanding Senior Secured Notes
data.description: On April 13, 2026, Clear Channel Outdoor Holdings, Inc. disclosed the outcomes of its consent solicitation for specific amendments. The company, identified as Clear Channel or CCO on the NYSE, provided updates regarding this solicitation.

data.title: PTC to Announce Fiscal Q2'26 Results on Wednesday, May 6, 2026
data.description: In Boston on April 13, 2026, PTC (NASDAQ: PTC) announced plans to unveil its fiscal 2026 second quarter results on May 6 after the stock market closes. A live webcast and conference call will be held by senior management at 5 pm Eastern on the same day to discuss the results.

data.title: N‑able Makes UEM AI-Native with MCP Server Launch
data.description: BURLINGTON, Mass.-- N-able, Inc., a cybersecurity company listed on NYSE as NABL, announced the launch of a custom Model Context Protocol (MCP) server at the Empower event. The server enables the connection of AI tools to real-time data within N-able’s Unified Endpoint Management (UEM) solutions, N-central and N-sight. Additionally, N-able introduced N-zo, an AI assistant within the products that provides guidance to assist teams in resolving issues more efficiently. This development signifies a significant advancement for N-able in integrating AI technology into its solutions.

data.title: BP Strengthens Exploration Pipeline With Namibia Offshore Play
data.description: BP's stock (NYSE: BP) rose in premarket trading despite broader indices pointing lower, reflecting a positive sentiment in the energy sector. The company announced its acquisition of a 60% stake in three offshore exploration blocks (PEL 97, PEL 99, PEL 100) in Namibia's Walvis Basin from Eco Atlantic Oil & Gas. This deal is subject to regulatory approvals, with BP set to operate the assets while Eco Atlantic and NAMCOR retaining minority stakes. Executive Vice President Gordon Birrell highlighted Namibia's growing industry interest, emphasizing long-term growth potential. This agreement aligns with BP's recent exploration successes, including discoveries through its Azule Energy joint venture with ENI S.p.A. (NYSE: E). BP's stock technicals show it trading 3.1% above its 20-day simple moving average at $47.09, indicating positive market performance.

data.title: Ferguson Enterprises Inc.: Notice of Dividend Currency Exchange Rate
data.description: Ferguson Enterprises Inc., a publicly listed company under NYSE: FERG and LSE: FERG, disclosed on February 18, 2026, its plan to issue a dividend of $0.89 per share. Shareholders as of the market close on March 6, 2026, will receive the dividend on April 30, 2026. Participants using CREST will default to receiving their dividend in pounds sterling (“GBP”), unless they opt for a different currency. For more information, please refer to the company's official communication.

data.title: First Horizon Earnings Are Imminent; These Most Accurate Analysts Revise Forecasts Ahead Of Earnings Call
data.description: First Horizon Corporation (NYSE: FHN) is scheduled to announce its first quarter earnings on April 15. Analysts predict the Memphis-based company will report earnings of 50 cents per share for the quarter, an increase from 42 cents per share in the same period last year. The consensus estimate for First Horizon's quarterly revenue stands at $869.85 million, compared to $816 million in the previous year. On January 15, First Horizon surpassed earnings expectations for the fourth quarter. Its shares closed at $24.05 on Friday, falling by 1.6%. Benzinga Pro provides access to the latest analyst ratings. For more details on the company's recent performance, readers can access the full story on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Comedian Michael Kosta Headlines Karmanos Comedy Champions
data.description: On April 13, 2026 in Detroit, a special event filled with laughter and positivity will be held to raise funds for high school and postgraduate students pursuing careers in oncology research and clinical care. The Barbara Ann Karmanos Cancer Institute is organizing this gathering, which aims to support these students in their training. This event will bring together stakeholders, donors, and those passionate about fighting cancer to make a difference.

data.title: YPF Awards Halliburton Multibillion-dollar Long-term Unconventional Completions Contract in Argentina
data.description: In Houston, Halliburton (NYSE: HAL) has announced a major contract win, being awarded a multibillion-dollar deal by YPF for providing bundled unconventional completions services at the Vaca Muerta shale formation, a highly productive resource globally. The competitive process led to this exclusive, dedicated partnership for several years, marking a significant expansion for Halliburton in Argentina and reflecting the strong trust YPF has in the company.

data.title: AdvanSix Appoints Patrick C. Day as Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer
data.description: In Parsippany, New Jersey, AdvanSix has appointed Patrick C. Day as their new Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer. This move comes as the company seeks to bolster its financial team with Day's expertise. Day will be responsible for overseeing the financial operations of AdvanSix, a company known for its innovative approach in the chemical industry. His role as CFO will involve managing financial strategies and ensuring the company's continued growth. With this appointment, AdvanSix aims to strengthen its financial leadership and drive further success in the industry.

data.title: Fastenal Company Reports 2026 First Quarter Earnings
data.description: Fastenal Company (Nasdaq:FAST), based in Winona, Minnesota, a key player in wholesale distribution of industrial and construction supplies, has announced their financial results for the quarter ending on March 31, 2026. Unless stated otherwise, figures in this report are in millions. The company provided details on common stock shares, per share data, and stockholders' equity for all periods. Shareholders and investors received a breakdown of the company's performance during this quarter.
